action.reasoning: Observation: SWAD training completed (25 epochs, val_acc 0.8115, SWAD averaged 17 checkpoints from epoch 8). Previous best was 21.17% with EMA. Need to evaluate SWAD checkpoint to see if it improves OOD generalization. Analysis: SWAD should find flatter minima which typically helps domain generalization. The val_acc is slightly lower than the EMA run (0.8115 vs 0.8154) but OOD performance may differ. Decision: Submit eval for current SWAD checkpoint, then plan DINOv2 + edge detection augmentation for next iteration.
